parsed_output.justification: Mitchell's opening claim is highly contradictory, stating he is either the Seer who saw two werewolves (which would mean no one is a werewolf) or a Werewolf who saw a Seer. This erratic behavior and his insistence that the group should not vote anyone out ('Don't kill me. We're good') are characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to divert suspicion and avoid elimination. While Justin claims to be the Troublemaker and Paul claims he was not a werewolf, Mitchell's confusing narrative makes him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf role.
